name: Spiced Almond Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease cookie sheets well.
2. Mix superfine sugar, ground almonds, and cinnamon in a bowl.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
4. Gently stir the ground almond mixture into the beaten egg whites.
5. Drop teaspoonfuls of the mixture 2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheets.
6. Sprinkle each macaroon with a sliced almond or two.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes until golden brown.
8. Allow to cool for 2 minutes before transferring to a wire rack. If any cookies stick, return the pan to the oven and reheat briefly before removing them.
